title: security-actions: missing admin authorization + hard-coded service-token secret fallback
source: synthetic — non-quota same-file multi-bug recall fixture

expectedFindings.rationale: purgeAuditLogsHandler performs a destructive audit-log purge after authentication but never checks actor.role or calls requireAdmin, so any signed-in user can purge audit logs.
createServiceToken falls back to a public hard-coded service-token secret when SERVICE_TOKEN_SECRET is missing, allowing predictable service-token signatures instead of failing closed.

notes: Recall fixture for duplicate-suppression hardening outside quota-manager. The two expected findings live in the same file but are unrelated root causes, so same-root duplicate suppression must not collapse one into the other.
